summary: UX Audit Batch 2 — 6 dashboard fixes. Clean, well-scoped work. One medium issue: new motion.div in CompactStatsBar collapsible should use m.div for LazyMotion strict consistency, and missing aria-controls on the toggle. All other changes (ALLCAPS removal, tag chips, Check Now button, KPI icon normalization) are excellent.

findings.description: New motion.div added at line 844 for CompactStatsBar collapse animation. With LazyMotion strict={true} in providers.tsx, the convention should be m.div (from motion/react-m). The entire codebase currently uses motion.* which works at runtime with Motion v12.34.0, but for strict mode correctness and bundle optimization, the new code should follow the m.* pattern. Since this is a codebase-wide pre-existing pattern, downgraded from HIGH to MEDIUM — but the new code should not add to the debt.
findings.fix: Import { m } from 'motion/react' and use <m.div> instead of <motion.div> for the collapsible animation. Note: this is also a pre-existing issue at line 621 (ClusterCard).

findings.description: Toggle button has aria-expanded but lacks aria-controls pointing to the expanded panel's id. Minor a11y gap for screen readers.
findings.fix: Add id='operations-pulse-panel' to the expanded motion.div and aria-controls='operations-pulse-panel' to the button.

findings.description: CompactStatsBar starts collapsed (useState(false)). The E2E test phase3-v194-animation.spec.ts:107 'dashboard renders stat cards' uses soft detection ([data-testid*='stat']) — won't fail but will now report 'No stat cards in test env'. Consider adding a test that clicks the toggle and verifies expanded state.
findings.fix: No code change needed, but a new E2E test for the collapsible Operations Pulse toggle (data-testid='operations-pulse-toggle') would improve coverage.

findings.description: Health counts in collapsed bar use hidden lg:flex — on smaller screens the health summary is invisible. Consider a compact mobile representation.
findings.fix: Optional: show health dot counts on mobile with a more compact layout.

positive_findings: Clean ALLCAPS removal across 8+ elements — consistent tracking-[0.04em]/[0.08em] replacement
Capability badges properly made non-interactive with pointer-events-none + select-none
Check Now button well-implemented: opacity-50 baseline visible, aria-label with clusterId, responsive label
KPI icon sizes properly normalized: h-3.5 w-3.5 icons, h-8 w-8 containers, rounded-xl
Collapsible CompactStatsBar is clean — good AnimatePresence usage, data-testid added, aria-expanded present
No architecture violations: no server.ts changes, no migrate(), no schema changes
Env badges correctly retain uppercase as the sole exception
